name: TEHOM
code: Object subclass: #Tehom instanceVariableNames: '' classVariableNames: '' poolDictionaries: '' category: 'NAVI'. Tehom allInstances printString

name: TZIMTZUM
code: (1 = 0) printString

name: KETHER
code: Object new identityHash printString

name: MENSAJE
code: 'hello' reversed printString

name: RECEPTOR
code: (3 + 4) printString

name: BLOQUE
code: ([:x | x * 2] value: 5) printString

name: CONDICIONAL
code: | x | x := 10. (x > 5) ifTrue: ['mayor'] ifFalse: ['menor']

name: ITERACION
code: | sum | sum := 0. 1 to: 5 do: [:i | sum := sum + i]. sum printString

name: EXCEPCION
code: [ 1/0 ] on: ZeroDivide do: [ :e | 'atrapado']

name: COLECCION
code: | c | c := OrderedCollection new. c add: 1. c add: 2. c add: 3. c size printString

name: DICCIONARIO
code: | d | d := Dictionary new. d at: #uno put: 1. d at: #dos put: 2. ((d at: #uno) + (d at: #dos)) printString

name: STREAM
code: (ReadStream on: #(10 20 30)) size printString

name: SELECCION
code: | r | r := #(1 2 3 4 5 6) select: [:x | x even]. r size printString

name: INYECCION
code: | r | r := #(1 2 3 4 5) inject: 0 into: [:acc :x | acc + x]. r printString

name: DEFINICION
code: | k | Object subclass: #Kether instanceVariableNames: '' classVariableNames: '' poolDictionaries: '' category: 'NAVI'. Kether compile: 'corona ^42'. k := Kether new. k corona printString

name: HERENCIA
code: | c | Object subclass: #Cuadrado instanceVariableNames: 'lado' classVariableNames: '' poolDictionaries: '' category: 'NAVI'. Cuadrado compile: 'lado: l lado := l'. Cuadrado compile: 'area ^lado * lado'. c := Cuadrado new. c lado: 4. c area printString

name: DAEMON
code: | d | Object subclass: #Daemon instanceVariableNames: 'estado' classVariableNames: '' poolDictionaries: '' category: 'NAVI'. Daemon compile: 'initialize estado := #latente'. Daemon compile: 'acoplar estado := #activo'. Daemon compile: 'estaVivo ^estado = #activo'. d := Daemon new. d acoplar. d estaVivo printString

name: POLIMORFISMO
code: | arr | Object subclass: #Forma instanceVariableNames: '' classVariableNames: '' poolDictionaries: '' category: 'NAVI'. Forma compile: 'nombre ^#forma'. Forma subclass: #Circulo instanceVariableNames: '' classVariableNames: '' poolDictionaries: '' category: 'NAVI'. Circulo compile: 'nombre ^#circulo'. Forma subclass: #Triangulo instanceVariableNames: '' classVariableNames: '' poolDictionaries: '' category: 'NAVI'. Triangulo compile: 'nombre ^#triangulo'. arr := Array with: Circulo new with: Triangulo new. (arr collect: [:f | f nombre]) printString

name: DAAT
code: | a b | a := Object new. b := Object new. (a == b) printString

name: IDENTIDAD
code: | a b | a := 'hola'. b := a. (a == b) printString

name: INTROSPECT
code: | c | c := OrderedCollection new. ((c isKindOf: Collection) & (c respondsTo: #add:)) printString

name: METACLASE
code: OrderedCollection class superclass printString

name: MALKUTH
code: (TextMorph new isKindOf: Morph) printString

name: AYIN
code: | methods | methods := Object methodDict keys asSortedCollection. (methods size > 10) printString

name: GEVURAH
code: | src | src := (Object >> #printString) sourceCode. (src includesSubstring: 'printOn:') printString

name: CHESED
code: | log | log := OrderedCollection new. 1 to: 10 do: [:i | (i \ 2 = 0) ifTrue: [log add: i]]. log printString

name: TIFERET
code: | fib | fib := [:n | | a b t | a := 0. b := 1. n timesRepeat: [t := b. b := a + b. a := t]. a]. (fib value: 10) printString

name: NETZACH
code: | d | d := Dictionary new. #(alfa beta gamma) doWithIndex: [:v :i | d at: v put: i]. (d at: #beta) printString

name: HOD
code: | s | s := ReadWriteStream on: String new. s nextPutAll: 'kether'. s nextPutAll: 'navi'. s reset. s contents

name: YESOD
code: | stack | stack := OrderedCollection new. #(1 2 3 4 5) do: [:x | stack addLast: x]. (stack removeLast + stack removeLast) printString

name: BINAH
code: | cls | cls := Behavior new. cls superclass: Object. cls setFormat: 0. (cls inheritsFrom: Object) printString

name: COLOR
code: | c | c := Color r: 1.0 g: 0.5 b: 0.0 alpha: 1.0. c printString

name: PUNTO
code: | p | p := 320@178. (p x + p y) printString

name: RECTANGULO
code: | r | r := Rectangle origin: 10@10 corner: 110@60. r area printString

name: FORM
code: | f | f := Form extent: 64@64 depth: 32. f fillColor: Color blue. (f colorAt: 32@32) printString

name: CANVAS-LINEA
code: | form gc | form := Form extent: 64@64 depth: 32. form fillColor: Color black. gc := FormCanvas on: form. gc line: 0@32 to: 63@32 color: Color white. (form colorAt: 32@32) printString

name: CANVAS-OVAL
code: | form gc | form := Form extent: 64@64 depth: 32. form fillColor: Color black. gc := FormCanvas on: form. gc fillOval: (10@10 corner: 54@54) color: Color cyan. (form colorAt: 32@32) printString

name: CANVAS-TEXTO
code: | form gc | form := Form extent: 200@40 depth: 32. form fillColor: Color black. gc := FormCanvas on: form. gc drawString: 'NAVI' at: 10@10 font: nil color: Color yellow. form printString

name: CANVAS-NAVI
code: | form gc ncm | form := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvas ifAbsent: [nil]. form isNil ifTrue: ['sin canvas'] ifFalse: [gc := FormCanvas on: form. gc fillRectangle: (0@0 corner: 640@356) color: Color black. gc fillOval: (240@128 corner: 400@228) color: Color cyan. gc drawString: 'NAVI en el mundo' at: 220@300 font: nil color: Color white. ncm := Smalltalk at: #NaviCanvasM ifAbsent: [nil]. ncm isNil ifFalse: [ncm image: form. ncm changed]. form printString]

name: MORPH-SUBCLASES
code: Morph subclasses size printString

name: RANDOM
code: | r vals | r := Random new. vals := (1 to: 5) collect: [:i | (r next * 100) truncated]. (vals inject: 0 into: [:a :x | a + x]) > 0

name: FRACCION
code: (3/4 + 1/4) printString

name: SORTED
code: (#(5 3 8 1 9 2) asSortedCollection) first printString

name: SET
code: | s | s := Set new. s add: 1. s add: 1. s add: 2. s size printString

name: CHAR
code: ($A asciiValue + 1) asCharacter printString

name: STRING-STREAM
code: | s | s := ReadWriteStream on: String new. s nextPutAll: 'kether'. s nextPutAll: 'navi'. s reset. s contents
